scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,client -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @maze3d/shared" "npm run dev -w @maze3d/server" "npm run dev -w @maze3d/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @maze3d/shared && npm run build -w @maze3d/client && npm run build -w @maze3d/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @maze3d/shared && npm run typecheck -w @maze3d/client && npm run typecheck -w @maze3d/server
